title: × laeliocattleya cauwenberghei
intro: × laeliocattleya cauwenberghei is a hybrid orchid species, specifically a cross between the Cattleya and Laelia orchids. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in its aerial roots, which are known to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of × laeliocattleya cauwenberghei include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the aerial roots of this plant are typically used to make infusions or decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
